query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: A LEGO minifigure in an orange flight suit with grey and white chest printing and a white helmet with grey and yellow markings sits on a dark grey studded baseplate. Behind the figure is a LEGO building facade made of tan, brown, and white bricks with dark lattice window pieces. Red and tan LEGO elements are positioned in the extreme right foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A LEGO minifigure in an orange flight suit with grey and white chest printing and a white helmet with grey and yellow markings sits in sharp focus on a dark grey baseplate, while intentional shallow depth of field softens the surrounding scene into smooth blur. Behind the figure is a LEGO building facade made of tan, brown, and white bricks with dark lattice window pieces, and red and tan LEGO elements in the extreme right foreground appear out of focus, giving the image a dynamic, macro-photography quality.
